# ctxseg
Official repository for Segmentation by Context (CTX-SEG)

## C vs NumPy backend

Below is a performance comparison between segmenting a 6 minute signal on Apple M2 Max. [[Source](/tests/test_ctxseg.py)]

```
C engine took: 0.195 secs
NumPy engine took: 3.108 secs
```
